comment: Plugins parked here are OFF (not served to members) but NOT deleted. Claude only reads marketplace.json, so nothing in this file is installable. To release a plugin, move its object into the plugins array of marketplace.json, then run sync-skills.sh and build-zips.sh and push. Decision 2026-06-10: agentic-os (the dashboard) deferred from the launch until it is redesigned solo-shaped and Greg has learned it; members will receive it later via the documented marketplace update path.

plugins.name: agentic-os
plugins.description: The SoloHQ Obsidian dashboard: a command-center vault with auto-installed plugins (Dataview, Terminal, Homepage) and Home + per-profile dashboards wired to Claude. Free.
